title: Midnight Frites & Dumplings
description: A savory Canadian midnight craving dish featuring crispy fries and gooey dumplings that are perfect for those who enjoy dash-friendly flavors.
instructions: Mix ground beef with salt, pepper, and onion in a large bowl. Add garlic and tomato paste; mix well.
Divide the mixture into two equal parts. Shape each part into dumplings using your hands. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Make fries by slicing the rice into thin strips and sprinkle with all-purpose flour. Lightly wet with water to help stick together.
Place fries on another baking sheet and spray with cooking oil (if desired).
Bake dumplings for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown. Bake fries for about 20 minutes, or until crispy.
Garnish with chives if using before serving.
